headline: WEBBER P5 ON DEBUT
story: Started P18 in a Minardi, finished P5 at his home race — one of F1's all-time dream debuts. Australia had a new hero.

headline: WEBBER'S P4 — STILL THE BEST
story: Webber qualified P5 and finished P4 at home — the closest an Australian has ever come to a home podium at Albert Park.

headline: RICCIARDO REPEATS THE NEAR-MISS
story: P4 again — Ricciardo's best home result, equalling Webber's 2012 finish. Australia still waiting for that podium.

headline: PIASTRI MAKES IT THREE
story: Three different Australian drivers, three P4s at Albert Park. The home podium curse continues.

headline: PIASTRI'S RAIN HEARTBREAK
story: Front row in qualifying, then a wet race went sideways: Piastri ran wide, dropped to P9. The title-fight year started badly at home.
